title: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet
content: HUMAN Security's State of AI Traffic report found that bots have eclipsed human users, with automated traffic growing eight times faster than human activity. summary: Artificial intelligence and bot systems, which were previously subtle or nascent on the internet, have become clearly dominant and pervasive, according to recent discussions. These automated tools now influence much of online content, interaction, and infrastructure, shaping how information is generated, shared, and perceived.*

title: 苹果 AI 国行正式上线
content: 3 月 31 日凌晨，Apple 智能国行版本正在开启推送。符合升级条件的 iPhone 将会在「设置」选项中看到原本的「Siri」选项，已经升级为「Apple 智能与 Siri」，随后进入选项，下载模型即可使用。Apple 智能国行版激活后，长按电源键将会触发「跑马灯」边框动画效果，而非传统的 Siri 跳动动画。在网友的测试中，Apple 智能国行版疑似调用了百度文心一言模型，视觉智能疑似使用 Google 的图像处理引擎能力。在拓展选项中，仍然保留了 ChatGPT 账号登录接口。升级要求必须是国行 iPhone，系统更新至最新的 iOS 26.4，iCloud 必须登录国区 Apple ID。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 3 月 31 日凌晨， Apple 智能 国行版本正在开启推送。符合升级条件的 iPhone 将会在「设置」选项中看到原本的「 Siri 」选项，已经升级为「 Apple 智能与 Siri」，随后进入选项，下载模型即可使用。Apple 智能国行版激活后，长按电源键将会触发「跑马灯」边框动画效果，而非传统的 Siri 跳动动画。在网友的测试中，Apple 智能国行版疑似调用了 百度 文心一言 模型，视觉智能疑似使用 Google 的图像处理引擎能力。在拓展选项中，仍然保留了 ChatGPT 账号登录接口。升级要求必须是国行 iPhone，系统更新至最新的 iOS 26.4 ， iCloud 必须登录国区 Apple ID 。 ​国行版苹果 AI 突然上线后又被撤回 苹果回应：正在积极推进落地中国 每经网 / 和讯网 2026-03-31 苹果国行 AI 凌晨意外上线后紧急下线 2026-03-31 苹果 AI 国行正式上线 2025-11-26 苹果 AI 在华推进最新迹象：官网问卷仅支持 +86 手机用户提交反馈 2025-10-29 苹果 iOS 26.1 RC 准正式版发布：新增液态玻璃透明度调节、国行 AI 依然没戏 2025-10-22 苹果国行 iPhone Air 正式发售 2025-09-28 苹果秘密开发内部 AI 聊天应用，为 Siri 大升级做准备 2025-09-21 消息称苹果 iPhone Air 国行下月上市，仅以合约机形式销售 2025-09-08 苹果计划年底前在中国推出 Apple Intelligence 2025-09-04 消息称苹果自研 AI 搜索引擎「世界知识问答」，计划 2026 年春季上线 2025-08-14 消息称苹果启动 AI 双轨计划，同步推进自研和外援 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004

representativeSources: Readhub - 每日早报 - 极客公园
scoreReasoning: 苹果AI国行上线，对AI模型和产品形态有重要影响。
summary: On March 31, 2024 Apple launched its China‑specific AI feature for iPhones. Devices meeting the upgrade criteria will see “Apple Smart & Siri” replace the original Siri option in Settings. After activation, holding the power button triggers a marquee‑style animation instead of the usual Siri animation. The feature reportedly uses Baidu's Wenxin Yiyan model and Google’s image processing engine, while still offering a ChatGPT login interface. An upgrade requires a Mainland China iPhone, iOS 26.4, and a China‑region Apple ID.

title: 带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文被中国学者指控学术不端
content: 谷歌研究院论文称新算法 TurboQuant 可大幅压缩 AI 大模型内存占用，遭苏黎世联邦理工学院博士后高健扬指控存在学术问题，如回避与 RaBitQ 算法相似性等。高健扬团队多次沟通，谷歌未彻底修正，还计划在 ICLR 2026 展示该论文。高健扬表示谷歌「知错不改」，自己在论文正式发表前就已指出问题，谷歌仍未彻底修正。高健扬团队接下来计划发布技术报告，继续寻求学术渠道解决。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 谷歌 研究院论文称新算法 TurboQuant 可大幅压缩 AI 大模型内存占用，遭 苏黎世联邦理工学院 博士后高健扬指控存在学术问题，如回避与 RaBitQ 算法相似性等。高健扬团队多次沟通，谷歌未彻底修正，还计划在 ICLR 2026 展示该论文。高健扬表示谷歌「知错不改」，自己在论文正式发表前就已指出问题，谷歌仍未彻底修正。高健扬团队接下来计划发布技术报告，继续寻求学术渠道解决。 独家对话！带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文陷学术争议，中国学者指其「严重失实」且「知错不改」：使用了我们的方法，但刻意回避相似性 每经网 干崩存储股的谷歌爆红论文塌房！被曝抄袭、贬低华人学者成果，谷歌回应：晚点改 网易科技 / 智东西 带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文陷学术争议，中国学者指其「严重失实」且「知错不改」：使用了我们的方法，但刻意回避相似性 华尔街见闻 2026-03-30 带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文被中国学者指控学术不端 2019-10-23 谷歌「量子优越性」论文正式发表，遭 IBM 质疑 2019-10-22 IBM 反驳谷歌实现「量子霸权」论文：他们操纵了测试结果 2019-07-10 谷歌回应 AI 专利争议：为了防御，不会牟利 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签

summary: Google researchers claim their TurboQuant algorithm greatly reduces AI model memory usage, but a postdoc from ETH Zurich accuses the paper of academic misconduct, citing omitted similarities to the RaBitQ method and uncorrected issues. Despite repeated outreach, Google has not fully revised the paper and still plans to present it at ICLR 2026. The accuser is preparing a technical report to pursue further academic scrutiny.

title: Coding Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again
content: I've been vibe-coding a lot lately. Like, a lot a lot Skip to content George London Software Raconteur AI Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again Posted on March 28, 2026 March 28, 2026 by George London I’ve been vibe-coding a lot lately. Like, a lot a lot. Maybe not quite the “AI psychosis” Andrej Karpathy recently joked about on No Priors , but not wildly far off either.[1] But the more I vibe, the more a thought recurs, i.e. that AI coding agents may be about to make free software matter more than it ever has. Not open source in the bland corporate sense. I mean free software in Stallman’s sense: software that gives users the freedom to run it, study it, modify it, and share it. Even for the relatively few who were aware of the distinction, it has felt mostly academic for a long time. SaaS made it hard to care software freedom because most people never saw or touched the source code of software they depended on in the first place. The code lived on someone else’s servers, the vendor handled operations, and the practical question became convenience, not freedom. Agents change that. If an agent can read a codebase, understand it, and modify it on your behalf, then access to source code stops being a symbolic right for programmers and becomes a practical capability for far more people. Suddenly the difference between software you can change and software you can only beg starts to really matter. And I don’t just think this in the abstract. I recently tried to get an AI agent to customize a SaaS app for me, and the experience made
eventKey: coding-agents-could-make-free-software
normalizedTitle: coding agents could make free software matter again
scoreReasoning: 强信号，AI在软件开发中的作用可能改变自由软件的重要性。
summary: Coding agents—automated tools that generate program code—could revive the importance of free software by making it easier to create and modify open‑source solutions. By automating routine coding tasks, these agents enable developers to focus on higher‑level design and community collaboration, potentially increasing the quantity and quality of freely available code. This shift may reinvigorate the free‑software ecosystem, encouraging shared innovation and cost‑effective software development.

title: DeepSeek 停机七小时，创下上线以来最严重的一次故障
content: DeepSeek is investigating a multi‑hour AI service outage after users reported errors. The investigation follows reports of widespread disruption in its AI offerings. DeepSeek has launched probes to determine the cause and restore functionality. The incident has prompted a review of system stability and user impact. The company’s response focus is on identifying the root cause and preventing future outages.

title: OpenAI 为 Claude Code 做了一个调用 Codex 的插件
content: Claude Code - @Livid - https://github.com/openai/codex-plugin-cc https://github.com/openai/codex-plugin-cc cc 写码 codex review 是黄金组合。每次我都叫 codex review 然后复制到 cc 然后再复制到 codex 让它看一下再复制这样翻来覆去的。之前稍微搜了一下没看到有这样的插件，现在 openai 自己出了，不错。而且 openai 让人随意用 sub ，和 a 社也是鲜明对比，a 禁止第三方“产品或服务”使用无论 headless 还是 sdk 调用 oauth 了 pro/max sub 的 cc Anthropic 基本上就是通过各种 Claude Code 内的限制、法务、以及 DMCA 来维护 Claude Code 的一亩三分地。现在 OpenAI 在它自己的生态中插一脚，很期待 Anthropic 的后续反应。 利益相关：Claude Code 重度使用者。 同一楼，经常让 codex review claude code 的实现 这个插件真是方便了这个流程 看了一下真的是为了 review cc 写的代码而开发的，codex 不会要自降身份，沦为代码助手而不是代码主力了吧？ 这样是不是 codex 可以光明正大的看 Claude 的生成，然后拿到训练数据，争取超过 Claude 别一家独大
eventKey: openai-claude-code-做了一个调用-codex-的插件
normalizedTitle: openai 为 claude code 做了一个调用 codex 的插件
scoreReasoning: 技术更新，对开发者工具和工程效率有影响，信号强度适中，未来影响有限。
summary: OpenAI has created a plugin that allows Claude Code to invoke the Codex model via an API call. The plugin, hosted on GitHub at https://github.com/openai/codex-plugin-cc, provides a bridge for developers integrating Codex functionality into the Claude Code environment.

title: The ladder is missing rungs – Engineering Progression When AI Ate the Middle
content: This is a lightly edited transcript of a talk I gave at QCon London on 17 March 2026. AI is approaching perfection on exactly the tasks that used to comprise the first decade of an engineering career, and those tasks were never just tasks. They were the mechanism that built judgment, intuition, and the ability […] The ladder is missing rungs Alasdair Allan 19 March 2026 This is a lightly edited transcript of a talk I gave at QCon London on 17 March 2026 . AI is approaching perfection on exactly the tasks that used to comprise the first decade of an engineering career, and those tasks were never just tasks. They were the mechanism that built judgment, intuition, and the ability to supervise the systems we now delegate to AI. The ladder isn’t just missing rungs. It’s missing the process that created the people who built the ladder. At a conference in New York last year, Dario Amodei, the co-inventor of reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and co-founder of Anthropic, predicted that within three to six months AI would be writing 90% of all code; and within twelve months, essentially all of it. At the six-month mark, Amodei claimed vindication, saying the 90% figure was “absolutely true,” at least within Anthropic. Act I: A Prediction Expires Twelve months on, almost to the day, and well, that’s not exactly what’s happened. A detailed analysis by Redwood Research concluded that the 90% number was misleading. If you count only code committed to repositories, it was closer to 50%. Which is still a pretty shocking number. The figure

title: 伊朗袭击航母后油价上涨、股市下跌：市场综述
content: Oil prices continued to rise after Iran attacked a crude‑oil tanker, extending gains noted in a recent market wrap. The incident prompted further upward pressure on benchmarks, reflecting heightened supply‑chain concerns and geopolitical risk in the Persian Gulf. Speculation about the attack’s impact on regional shipping and overall oil availability helped sustain the rally.

normalizedTitle: 阿里千问上线全模态大模型 qwen3 5-omni
scoreReasoning: Alibaba's multimodal large model release, significant in AI development.
summary: Alibaba has released Qwen3.5‑Omni, a multimodal large model available in Plus, Flash, and Light sizes. It supports a 256k-token context window, over ten hours of audio input, and more than 400 seconds of 720 P video at 1 FPS. The model offers speech recognition in 113 languages and dialects and speech synthesis in 36. It can be accessed via Offline and Realtime APIs.

title: 特朗普实施贸易关税后，英国对美食品出口大幅下滑
content: The United Kingdom’s exports of food and drink items to the United States fell sharply after President Trump imposed trade tariffs. Bloomberg reports that the tariff‑related decline was significant, indicating a major reduction in UK food exports to the US market.

scoreReasoning: 提供AI服务的最新动态，对用户有直接影响。
summary: DeepSeek’s web and app chat services have experienced repeated performance outages since last night, with the issue still under investigation. Their API in older models remains stable. Meanwhile, DeepSeek updated its models, improving text quality and SVG generation. OpenClaw released version 2026.3.28, adding plugin approval hooks, xAI API support, and Discord/iMessage bindings. Rumors claim OpenAI plans a low‑cost “Codex‑only” subscription tied to admin control, though details are unconfirmed. Meta is testing its Avocado model family but performance lags behind Gemini 3 and GPT‑5, delaying release to May.

content: Unilever is close to agreeing on a $60 billion deal with Wanhua, creating a new food industry giant. The transaction, valued at roughly $60 billion including debt, will combine the two companies’ operations.

title: FirstFT：能源冲击下，亚洲各国竭力捍卫本国货币
content: Asian nations are fighting to shield their currencies after an energy shock triggered volatility in the global market. Rising global energy prices pressured local currencies, prompting central banks and governments to intervene and defend national currencies against sharp depreciation. These coordinated efforts aim to stabilize exchange rates and mitigate the impact of heightened energy costs on domestic economies.

title: 2026 03 31 HackerNews
content: 2026-03-31 Hacker News Top Stories # GitHub Copilot 被曝在超过 150 万个拉取请求描述中擅自插入推广自身及第三方工具的广告内容，引发开发者对平台滥用权限和信任危机的强烈质疑。 ChatGPT 通过 Cloudflare 的加密 JavaScript 程序收集浏览器指纹、网络位置及 React 状态等 55 项指标进行反自动化验证，导致用户在验证完成前无法输入内容。 通过 Linux 系统配合 hostapd、dnsmasq 和 nftables 等工具，任何具备双网络接口的旧设备均可配置为支持 Wi-Fi 热点、DHCP 和防火墙功能的完整路由器。 互联网正演变为"认知黑暗森林"，个人创意被中心化 AI 平台迅速复制吸收，使创作者陷入要么封闭知识要么滋养竞争对手的两难境地。 Neovim 0.12.0 稳定版正式发布，基于 LuaJIT 2.1 构建并支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 多平台，带来大量新功能与修复。 费城法院系统宣布全面禁止具备录音录像功能的智能眼镜进入所有法院区域，以防止对司法程序的干扰和对证人的潜在威胁。 MacBook 因键盘与顶盖铆钉固定设计导致单个按键故障需更换整个顶盖（成本高达 730 欧元），作者最终通过软件重新映射按键规避了昂贵维修。 AI 行业面临科技巨头防御性投资、实验室运营成本高昂及商业化困难等多重压力，若泡沫破裂将引发企业减值、风投枯竭及硬件巨头受创的连锁反应。 微软 Copilot 被曝在超过 150 万份 GitHub 拉取请求中自动注入隐藏广告推广第三方工具，引发开发者强烈不满后官方道歉并关闭该功能。 复古演示场景文化中存在手工复制现有图像的传统，强调技艺展示而非绝对原创，反映了数字艺术创作中借鉴与创新的独特伦理边界。 1. summary: GitHub Copilot has inserted hidden ads into over 1.5 million pull‑request descriptions, prompting developer backlash and a Microsoft apology. ChatGPT’s Cloudflare‑based turnstile blocks typing until extensive fingerprinting and anti‑automation checks finish, worsening UX. Second‑hand Linux machines can be converted into routers with hostapd, dnsmasq, and nftables. AI platforms are tightening control, while regulatory bans—e.g., Philly courts outlawing smart glasses—raise privacy concerns. Meanwhile, Neovim 0.12.0 releases bring new features and fixes across major OSes.

title: 使用 Claude Code 时，突然蹦出新 Idea 怎么管理最优雅
content: ☕Vibe Coding🤖 - @linfx7 - 最近用 Claude Code 发现一个很微妙的痛点：当 CC 正在疯狂 Thinking 时，脑子里经常会蹦出一些想法————比如某个旧功能的优化方案，或者一个新功能的设计，或者一个可能的 最近用 Claude Code 发现一个很微妙的痛点： 当 CC 正在疯狂 Thinking 时，脑子里经常会蹦出一些想法————比如某个旧功能的优化方案，或者一个新功能的设计，或者一个可能的 bug 。 如果停下来去写文档，就忘了当前任务；如果不记下来，CC 跑完这一轮我可能就忘了。 想问一下大家在用 AI 编程时，是如何平衡“当前任务”与“随手灵感”的？ 有没有什么工具、MCP 、Skill 推荐。 来试试 我的 agent-kanban ，我现在就是让 leader agent 帮我记到 todo 里，不分配 agent 就不会执行，需要执行的时候再拉出来讨论清楚了分配给 worker agent 就可以去执行了 隔壁 get-shit-done 就有专门设计了一些捕获 idea 的指令 /gsd:plant-seed <idea> Capture forward-looking ideas with trigger conditions — surfaces at the right milestone /gsd:add-backlog <desc> Add idea to backlog parking lot (999.x numbering, outside active sequence) /gsd:review-backlog Review and promote backlog items to active milestone or remove stale entries /gsd:thread [name] Persistent context threads — lightweight cross-session knowledge for work spanning multiple sessions /gsd:add-todo [desc] Capture idea for later /gsd:note <text> Zero-friction idea capture — append, list, or promote notes to todos 有时候挺有用的，比起 claude 玄学的 memory 机制（时灵时不灵，而且不能跨 agent 使用） 多开几个 git worktree 和 Claude Code ，看哪个空闲就把 idea 发过去 https://github.com/DeadWaveWave/opencove 试试这个开源工具，无限画布，统一管理 agent 窗口，支持类似便签的功能，记录 todo 事项，可以试试 docs 记录一个 md 文件长期打开， 随手往里面按顺序写 idea 。。。 保存。。
eventKey: claude-code-突然蹦出新-idea-怎么管理最优雅
normalizedTitle: 使用 claude code 时 突然蹦出新 idea 怎么管理最优雅
scoreReasoning: 个人相关性较高，讨论了AI工具使用中的问题，但影响有限。
summary: Claude Code users often encounter fleeting ideas while the assistant is generating code. These can be new feature designs, optimizations, or bug hypotheses. Writing documentation mid‑thought risks losing the original task focus, whereas ignoring the notes may result in forgotten insights. The post asks for strategies and tools that balance maintaining the current coding workflow with capturing spontaneous ideas effectively.

summary: Tencent has released an open‑source CLI tool for its Enterprise WeChat platform. The CLI, available on GitHub, exposes seven core capabilities—such as messaging, address book, documents, and smart spreadsheets—for use by mainstream AI agents. Aimed mainly at small companies (10 or fewer users), it enables developers to quickly build AI applications. Integration involves three steps: configure the bot in the Enterprise WeChat backend, install the CLI and skill package, and call the provided skills to access the features.

title: 零售业游说团体称，英国消费者将面临物价上涨
content: A UK retail lobbying group warns that consumers will face higher prices in the coming months, citing rising retail costs. The group attributes the increase to broader economic pressures and anticipates those impacts will spread across many consumer products. No specific timeline is given, but the organization expects price rises to become evident soon.

title: 市场监管总局：推动研究制定《禁止网络不正当竞争条例》
content: 市场监管总局发布通知，提出完善制度规则体系。构建公开透明可预期的反不正当竞争法律制度体系，对标高水平国际经贸规则增强制度型开放话语权，推动研究制定《禁止网络不正当竞争条例》，制修订相关规章，推动研究发布行业市场价格与竞争行为评估报告，构建多层次政策工具箱。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 市场监管总局 发布通知，提出完善制度规则体系。构建公开透明可预期的反不正当竞争法律制度体系，对标高水平国际经贸规则增强制度型开放话语权，推动研究制定《禁止网络不正当竞争条例》，制修订相关规章，推动研究发布行业市场价格与竞争行为评估报告，构建多层次政策工具箱。 市场监管总局：强化网络不正当竞争行为监管，加大对人工智能等新兴产业的保护力度 格隆汇 2026-03-30 市场监管总局：推动研究制定《禁止网络不正当竞争条例》 2026-03-24 市场监管总局召开 2026 年价格监督检查和反不正当竞争工作座谈会 2026-03-20 市场监管总局重拳整治假证书乱象 将直播间运营者、主播纳入监管 2026-02-26 市场监管总局：严厉打击 3 类食品虚假宣传行为 2026-02-06 市场监管总局公布五起人工智能领域不正当竞争典型案例 2026-01-22 市场监管总局首次对公用事业领域企业并购亮红牌 2026-01-14 市场监管总局修订发布《网络市场监管与服务示范区创建管理办法》 2026-01-07 市场监管总局、国家网信办联合发布《网络交易平台规则监督管理办法》 2026-01-07 两部门：网络交易平台经营者不得利用平台规则差异定价 2025-12-19 市场监管总局修改《禁止垄断协议规定》，将于明年施行 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004
eventKey: 市场监管总局-推动研究制定-禁止网络不正当竞争条例
normalizedTitle: 市场监管总局 推动研究制定 禁止网络不正当竞争条例
scoreReasoning: Regulatory framework improvement, relevant to software industry.
summary: The State Administration of Market Regulation announced steps to improve the regulatory framework for anti‑unfair competition. It aims to develop a transparent and predictable legal system, align it with advanced international trade standards, and empower institutional openness. The agency will study the creation of a “Regulation to Prevent Unfair Competition in the Internet,” amend related rules, and prepare industry reports on market pricing and competitive practices, building a multi‑tiered policy toolkit.

title: 全行业都狂卷 Harness，Anthropic 还在加码，Codex 负责人却说它正在退场 | 原文
content: The article reports on discussions at OpenAI about the Codex project’s challenges and the emerging uses of its Coding Agent. It outlines the agent as comprising a user interface, a language model (such as OpenAI’s GPT‑5.1 series or third‑party models), and a Harness component that connects the two. The piece notes that while the industry is racing to build Hunts, Anthropic is increasing its efforts, and the Codex lead has indicated the project is winding down.

title: 华盛顿州将对超过100万美元的收入开征新税
content: Washington state has enacted a law imposing a new tax on individuals earning more than $1 million, adding it to the list of Democratic-run states taxing high incomes.

title: 标普500指数延续跌势，美油收于100美元上方
content: 中东地面战争前景黯淡，冲突短期内结束的希望随之破灭。受此影响，标普500指数周一延续跌势，油价则升至2022年俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后数月以来的最高水平。

title: 伊朗重申未与美方直接对话，特朗普被曝希望4月6日前达成协议，双方各说各话在博弈什么？为什么是4月6日？
content: 当地时间30日，伊朗外交部发言人巴加埃表示，伊朗迄今未与美国进行任何直接谈判，伊朗方面通过部分中间方收到有关美国表达谈判意愿的信息。外界提及的所谓美方停火“15点计划”，其要求“过分且不合理”。巴加埃表示，与美方不断改变立场、发表相互矛盾言论不同，伊朗方面始终立场明确。 同一天，白宫新闻秘书莱维特在发布会上称，伊朗在非公开会谈中已同意美方提出的部分要点，并称特朗普希望在4月6日前达成协议。莱维特强调，美伊间的对话仍在持续进行，且进展顺利。 特朗普30日称，若与伊朗达不成协议，将“彻底摧毁”该国所有发电厂、油井及哈尔克岛。对此…
